creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Sat Mar  8 08:22:55 2014
New Revision: 347454
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/347454
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r347454/

Log:
  - Update to 1.203
  - Add LICENSE
  - Support STAGEDIR
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  - While I'm here, use TEST_DEPENDS
  
  Changes:	http://search.cpan.org/dist/Email-Reply/Changes
  PR:		ports/187359
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/mail/p5-Email-Reply/Makefile
  head/mail/p5-Email-Reply/distinfo
  head/mail/p5-Email-Reply/pkg-plist

Modified: head/mail/p5-Email-Reply/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/mail/p5-Email-Reply/Makefile	Sat Mar  8 08:22:50 2014	(r347453)
+++ head/mail/p5-Email-Reply/Makefile	Sat Mar  8 08:22:55 2014	(r347454)
@@ -2,19 +2,22 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	Email-Reply
-PORTVERSION=	1.202
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTVERSION=	1.203
 CATEGORIES=	mail perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Email::Reply - Reply to a Message
 
-RUN_DEPENDS=	p5-Email-Abstract>=2.01:${PORTSDIR}/mail/p5-Email-Abstract \
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
+BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-Email-Abstract>=2.01:${PORTSDIR}/mail/p5-Email-Abstract \
 		p5-Email-Address>=1.80:${PORTSDIR}/mail/p5-Email-Address \
-		p5-Email-MIME>=1.82:${PORTSDIR}/mail/p5-Email-MIME \
-		p5-Email-Simple>=2.100:${PORTSDIR}/mail/p5-Email-Simple
+		p5-Email-MIME>=1.82:${PORTSDIR}/mail/p5-Email-MIME
+RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
+TEST_DEPENDS=	p5-Capture-Tiny>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Capture-Tiny
 
 USES=		perl5
 USE_PERL5=	configure

Modified: head/mail/p5-Email-Reply/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/mail/p5-Email-Reply/distinfo	Sat Mar  8 08:22:50 2014	(r347453)
+++ head/mail/p5-Email-Reply/distinfo	Sat Mar  8 08:22:55 2014	(r347454)

+SHA256 (Email-Reply-1.203.tar.gz) = 54128578569d76fe0089e6f7632e298484d034d1f50c63e85f2926fecbed3db0
+SIZE (Email-Reply-1.203.tar.gz) = 15942

Modified: head/mail/p5-Email-Reply/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- head/mail/p5-Email-Reply/pkg-plist	Sat Mar  8 08:22:50 2014	(r347453)
+++ head/mail/p5-Email-Reply/pkg-plist	Sat Mar  8 08:22:55 2014	(r347454)
@@ -1,5 +1,6 @@
 %%SITE_PERL%%/Email/Reply.pm
 %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/Email/Reply/.packlist
 %%PERL5_MAN3%%/Email::Reply.3.gz
-@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/Email/Reply

+@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/Email
 @dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/Email
